TestCase.name: testBuildSideProctimeIsMaterialized
TestCase.Resource: SELECT probe.pk, s.bk, s.bv, s.pt FROM probe JOIN LATERAL TABLE(SNAPSHOT(input => TABLE b_proctime, load_completed_condition => 'user_time', load_completed_time => CAST(TIMESTAMP '2026-07-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP_LTZ(3)))) AS s ON probe.pk = s.bk

LogicalProject(pk=[$0], bk=[$3], bv=[$4], pt=[$6]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[$2]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[SNAPSHOT(TABLE(#0), _UTF-16LE'user_time', CAST(2026-07-01 00:00:00):TIMESTAMP_WITH_LOCAL_TIME_ZONE(3) NOT NULL, DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], rowType=[RecordType(VARCHAR(2147483647) bk, INTEGER bv, TIMESTAMP(3) bts, TIMESTAMP_WITH_LOCAL_TIME_ZONE(3) pt)]) +- LogicalProject(bk=[$0], bv=[$1], bts=[$2], pt=[$3]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[$2]) +- LogicalProject(bk=[$0], bv=[$1], bts=[$2], pt=[PROCTIME()]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b_proctime]])

Calc(select=[pk, bk, bv, pt]) +- LateralSnapshotJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[=(pk, bk)], select=[pk, bk, bv, pt, bts], loadCompletedCondition=[user_time], loadCompletedTime=[1782864000000]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[pk]]) : +- Calc(select=[pk]) : +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[pts]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe, project=[pk, pts], metadata=[]]], fields=[pk, pts]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[bk]]) +- Calc(select=[bk, bv, PROCTIME_MATERIALIZE(pt) AS pt, bts]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[bts]) +- Calc(select=[bk, bv, bts, PROCTIME() AS pt]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b_proctime]], fields=[bk, bv, bts])

TestCase.name: testInnerJoin
TestCase.Resource: SELECT * FROM probe JOIN LATERAL TABLE(SNAPSHOT(input => TABLE b, load_completed_condition => 'user_time', load_completed_time => CAST(TIMESTAMP '2026-07-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP_LTZ(3)))) AS s ON probe.pk = s.bk

LogicalProject(pk=[$0], pv=[$1], pts=[$2], bk=[$3], bv=[$4], bts=[$5]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[$2]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[SNAPSHOT(TABLE(#0), _UTF-16LE'user_time', CAST(2026-07-01 00:00:00):TIMESTAMP_WITH_LOCAL_TIME_ZONE(3) NOT NULL, DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], rowType=[RecordType(VARCHAR(2147483647) bk, INTEGER bv, TIMESTAMP(3) bts)]) +- LogicalProject(bk=[$0], bv=[$1], bts=[$2]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]])

LateralSnapshotJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[=(pk, bk)], select=[pk, pv, pts, bk, bv, bts], loadCompletedCondition=[user_time], loadCompletedTime=[1782864000000]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[pk]]) : +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[pts]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]], fields=[pk, pv, pts]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[bk]]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[bts]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]], fields=[bk, bv, bts])

TestCase.name: testInnerJoinWithCompositeKeys
TestCase.Resource: SELECT * FROM probe JOIN LATERAL TABLE(SNAPSHOT(input => TABLE b, load_completed_condition => 'user_time', load_completed_time => CAST(TIMESTAMP '2026-07-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP_LTZ(3)))) AS s ON probe.pk = s.bk AND probe.pv = s.bv

LogicalProject(pk=[$0], pv=[$1], pts=[$2], bk=[$3], bv=[$4], bts=[$5]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($0, $3), =($1, $4))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[$2]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[SNAPSHOT(TABLE(#0), _UTF-16LE'user_time', CAST(2026-07-01 00:00:00):TIMESTAMP_WITH_LOCAL_TIME_ZONE(3) NOT NULL, DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], rowType=[RecordType(VARCHAR(2147483647) bk, INTEGER bv, TIMESTAMP(3) bts)]) +- LogicalProject(bk=[$0], bv=[$1], bts=[$2]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]])

LateralSnapshotJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(pk, bk), =(pv, bv))], select=[pk, pv, pts, bk, bv, bts], loadCompletedCondition=[user_time], loadCompletedTime=[1782864000000]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[pk, pv]]) : +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[pts]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]], fields=[pk, pv, pts]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[bk, bv]]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[bts]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]], fields=[bk, bv, bts])

TestCase.name: testInnerJoinWithCteBuildSide
TestCase.Resource: WITH cte AS (SELECT bk, bv + 1 AS bv, bts FROM b) SELECT * FROM probe JOIN LATERAL TABLE(SNAPSHOT(input => TABLE cte, load_completed_condition => 'user_time', load_completed_time => CAST(TIMESTAMP '2026-07-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP_LTZ(3)))) AS s ON probe.pk = s.bk

LogicalProject(pk=[$0], pv=[$1], pts=[$2], bk=[$3], bv=[$4], bts=[$5]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[$2]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[SNAPSHOT(TABLE(#0), _UTF-16LE'user_time', CAST(2026-07-01 00:00:00):TIMESTAMP_WITH_LOCAL_TIME_ZONE(3) NOT NULL, DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], rowType=[RecordType(VARCHAR(2147483647) bk, INTEGER bv, TIMESTAMP(3) bts)]) +- LogicalProject(bk=[$0], bv=[$1], bts=[$2]) +- LogicalProject(bk=[$0], bv=[+($1, 1)], bts=[$2]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]])

LateralSnapshotJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[=(pk, bk)], select=[pk, pv, pts, bk, bv, bts], loadCompletedCondition=[user_time], loadCompletedTime=[1782864000000]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[pk]]) : +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[pts]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]], fields=[pk, pv, pts]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[bk]]) +- Calc(select=[bk, +(bv, 1) AS bv, bts]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[bts]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]], fields=[bk, bv, bts])

TestCase.name: testInnerJoinWithIdleTimeoutAndStateTtl
TestCase.Resource: SELECT * FROM probe JOIN LATERAL TABLE(SNAPSHOT(input => TABLE b, load_completed_condition => 'user_time', load_completed_time => CAST(TIMESTAMP '2026-07-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP_LTZ(3)), load_completed_idle_timeout => INTERVAL '10' SECOND, state_ttl => INTERVAL '1' DAY)) AS s ON probe.pk = s.bk

LogicalProject(pk=[$0], pv=[$1], pts=[$2], bk=[$3], bv=[$4], bts=[$5]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[$2]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[SNAPSHOT(TABLE(#0), _UTF-16LE'user_time', CAST(2026-07-01 00:00:00):TIMESTAMP_WITH_LOCAL_TIME_ZONE(3) NOT NULL, 10000:INTERVAL SECOND, 86400000:INTERVAL DAY)], rowType=[RecordType(VARCHAR(2147483647) bk, INTEGER bv, TIMESTAMP(3) bts)]) +- LogicalProject(bk=[$0], bv=[$1], bts=[$2]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]])

LateralSnapshotJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[=(pk, bk)], select=[pk, pv, pts, bk, bv, bts], loadCompletedCondition=[user_time], loadCompletedTime=[1782864000000], loadCompletedIdleTimeout=[10000 ms], stateTtl=[86400000 ms]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[pk]]) : +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[pts]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]], fields=[pk, pv, pts]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[bk]]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[bts]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]], fields=[bk, bv, bts])

TestCase.name: testInnerJoinWithNonEquiCondition
TestCase.Resource: SELECT * FROM probe JOIN LATERAL TABLE(SNAPSHOT(input => TABLE b, load_completed_condition => 'user_time', load_completed_time => CAST(TIMESTAMP '2026-07-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP_LTZ(3)))) AS s ON probe.pk = s.bk AND probe.pv > s.bv

LogicalProject(pk=[$0], pv=[$1], pts=[$2], bk=[$3], bv=[$4], bts=[$5]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($0, $3), >($1, $4))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[$2]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[SNAPSHOT(TABLE(#0), _UTF-16LE'user_time', CAST(2026-07-01 00:00:00):TIMESTAMP_WITH_LOCAL_TIME_ZONE(3) NOT NULL, DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], rowType=[RecordType(VARCHAR(2147483647) bk, INTEGER bv, TIMESTAMP(3) bts)]) +- LogicalProject(bk=[$0], bv=[$1], bts=[$2]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]])

LateralSnapshotJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(pk, bk), >(pv, bv))], select=[pk, pv, pts, bk, bv, bts], loadCompletedCondition=[user_time], loadCompletedTime=[1782864000000]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[pk]]) : +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[pts]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]], fields=[pk, pv, pts]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[bk]]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[bts]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]], fields=[bk, bv, bts])

TestCase.name: testInnerJoinWithTimeAttributeInCondition
TestCase.Resource: SELECT * FROM probe JOIN LATERAL TABLE(SNAPSHOT(input => TABLE b, load_completed_condition => 'user_time', load_completed_time => CAST(TIMESTAMP '2026-07-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP_LTZ(3)))) AS s ON probe.pk = s.bk AND probe.pts >= s.bts

LogicalProject(pk=[$0], pv=[$1], pts=[$2], bk=[$3], bv=[$4], bts=[$5]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[AND(=($0, $3), >=($2, $5))], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[$2]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[SNAPSHOT(TABLE(#0), _UTF-16LE'user_time', CAST(2026-07-01 00:00:00):TIMESTAMP_WITH_LOCAL_TIME_ZONE(3) NOT NULL, DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], rowType=[RecordType(VARCHAR(2147483647) bk, INTEGER bv, TIMESTAMP(3) bts)]) +- LogicalProject(bk=[$0], bv=[$1], bts=[$2]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]])

LateralSnapshotJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[AND(=(pk, bk), >=(pts, bts))], select=[pk, pv, pts, bk, bv, bts], loadCompletedCondition=[user_time], loadCompletedTime=[1782864000000]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[pk]]) : +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[pts]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]], fields=[pk, pv, pts]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[bk]]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[bts]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]], fields=[bk, bv, bts])

TestCase.name: testInnerJoinWithoutBuildTimeColumn
TestCase.Resource: SELECT probe.pk, probe.pv, s.bv FROM probe JOIN LATERAL TABLE(SNAPSHOT(input => TABLE b, load_completed_condition => 'user_time', load_completed_time => CAST(TIMESTAMP '2026-07-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP_LTZ(3)))) AS s ON probe.pk = s.bk

LogicalProject(pk=[$0], pv=[$1], bv=[$4]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[inner]) :- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[$2]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[SNAPSHOT(TABLE(#0), _UTF-16LE'user_time', CAST(2026-07-01 00:00:00):TIMESTAMP_WITH_LOCAL_TIME_ZONE(3) NOT NULL, DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], rowType=[RecordType(VARCHAR(2147483647) bk, INTEGER bv, TIMESTAMP(3) bts)]) +- LogicalProject(bk=[$0], bv=[$1], bts=[$2]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]])

Calc(select=[pk, pv, bv]) +- LateralSnapshotJoin(joinType=[InnerJoin], where=[=(pk, bk)], select=[pk, pv, bk, bv, bts], loadCompletedCondition=[user_time], loadCompletedTime=[1782864000000]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[pk]]) : +- Calc(select=[pk, pv]) : +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[pts]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]], fields=[pk, pv, pts]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[bk]]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[bts]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]], fields=[bk, bv, bts])

TestCase.name: testLeftJoin
TestCase.Resource: SELECT * FROM probe LEFT JOIN LATERAL TABLE(SNAPSHOT(input => TABLE b, load_completed_condition => 'user_time', load_completed_time => CAST(TIMESTAMP '2026-07-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP_LTZ(3)))) AS s ON probe.pk = s.bk

LogicalProject(pk=[$0], pv=[$1], pts=[$2], bk=[$3], bv=[$4], bts=[$5]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[left]) :- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[$2]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[SNAPSHOT(TABLE(#0), _UTF-16LE'user_time', CAST(2026-07-01 00:00:00):TIMESTAMP_WITH_LOCAL_TIME_ZONE(3) NOT NULL, DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], rowType=[RecordType(VARCHAR(2147483647) bk, INTEGER bv, TIMESTAMP(3) bts)]) +- LogicalProject(bk=[$0], bv=[$1], bts=[$2]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]])

LateralSnapshotJoin(joinType=[LeftOuterJoin], where=[=(pk, bk)], select=[pk, pv, pts, bk, bv, bts], loadCompletedCondition=[user_time], loadCompletedTime=[1782864000000]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[pk]]) : +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[pts]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]], fields=[pk, pv, pts]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[bk]]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[bts]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]], fields=[bk, bv, bts])

TestCase.name: testLeftJoinWithoutBuildTimeColumn
TestCase.Resource: SELECT probe.pk, probe.pv, s.bv FROM probe LEFT JOIN LATERAL TABLE(SNAPSHOT(input => TABLE b, load_completed_condition => 'user_time', load_completed_time => CAST(TIMESTAMP '2026-07-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP_LTZ(3)))) AS s ON probe.pk = s.bk

LogicalProject(pk=[$0], pv=[$1], bv=[$4]) +- LogicalJoin(condition=[=($0, $3)], joinType=[left]) :- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[$2]) : +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[SNAPSHOT(TABLE(#0), _UTF-16LE'user_time', CAST(2026-07-01 00:00:00):TIMESTAMP_WITH_LOCAL_TIME_ZONE(3) NOT NULL, DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], rowType=[RecordType(VARCHAR(2147483647) bk, INTEGER bv, TIMESTAMP(3) bts)]) +- LogicalProject(bk=[$0], bv=[$1], bts=[$2]) +- LogicalWatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]])

Calc(select=[pk, pv, bv]) +- LateralSnapshotJoin(joinType=[LeftOuterJoin], where=[=(pk, bk)], select=[pk, pv, bk, bv, bts], loadCompletedCondition=[user_time], loadCompletedTime=[1782864000000]) :- Exchange(distribution=[hash[pk]]) : +- Calc(select=[pk, pv]) : +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[pts], watermark=[pts]) : +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, probe]], fields=[pk, pv, pts]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[bk]]) +- WatermarkAssigner(rowtime=[bts], watermark=[bts]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, b]], fields=[bk, bv, bts])
